text.content: REPLACE where and why this happens, trigger conditions, read-aloud text.

REPLACE creature list with counts. Link actors like @UUID[Compendium.REPLACE_MODULE_ID.actors.Actor.REPLACE_ID]{Display Name} — get the exact link with: node scripts/content/uuid.mjs actors/<file>.json
REPLACE how enemies fight, morale, retreat conditions, environmental factors.
REPLACE loot. Link items like @UUID[Compendium.REPLACE_MODULE_ID.items.Item.REPLACE_ID]{Item Name} or a loot table @UUID[Compendium.REPLACE_MODULE_ID.tables.RollTable.REPLACE_ID]{Table Name}.
